name: Harvest Hot Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the barley with plenty of water. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 30 - 40 minutes. Drain and reserve the stock.
2. Heat the oil in a large pan and gently fry the shallots, leeks, potato, carrots, and mushrooms for 8 - 10 minutes. Add the rosemary, thyme, and cooked barley.
3. Make the reserved stock up to 3/4 pint with water. Add it to the barley and vegetables together with the yeast extract. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes. Season to taste. Serve hot.
